seed_pages.content:
---
title: Halcyon Quillfeather
type: person
aliases: [halcyon]
summary: Founder of Quartzbloom Systems.
---

Halcyon Quillfeather is the founder of Quartzbloom Systems. Halcyon is exploring a pivot toward the enterprise segment.

---
title: Zelda Bransome
type: person
aliases: [zelda]
summary: Founder of Russetvane Systems.
---

Zelda Bransome is the founder of Russetvane Systems. Zelda pushed back on the proposed valuation during diligence.

---
title: Quartzbloom Systems
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Halcyon Quillfeather.
---

Quartzbloom Systems is a seed-stage company. Founded by Halcyon Quillfeather. The seed conversation started in 2025.

---
title: Foxglove Capital
type: org
summary: Early-stage fund that co-invests on seed rounds.
---

Foxglove Capital is an early-stage fund that co-invests on seed rounds.

turns.text: Draft a memo for the partner meeting: Halcyon Quillfeather and Zelda Bransome both want Foxglove Capital in the Quartzbloom Systems round.
Make the memo lead with traction, then risks, then the ask.
